title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · Mastery Check
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a tested tool-loop state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
